name: What made you laugh
prompts: What's a Slack message you saved this week?
Describe the last meeting that made you smile — what was the moment?
What's a commit message in our history that's funnier than it should be?
What's a typo in production that no one's allowed to fix?
What's the silliest thing in your bookmarks right now?
Name a side project you'd build only for the joke of it.
What's a piece of dev-tools UI that delighted you recently?
Tell us about a debugging session that ended with you laughing instead of crying.
